# openrouter_providers (Data Source)

Lists OpenRouter provider metadata.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "openrouter_providers" "all" {}

output "provider_slugs" {
  value = [for provider in data.openrouter_providers.all.providers : provider.slug]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `providers` (Attributes List) OpenRouter providers. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--providers))

<a id="nestedatt--providers"></a>
### Nested Schema for `providers`

Read-Only:

- `datacenters` (List of String)
- `headquarters` (String)
- `name` (String)
- `privacy_policy_url` (String)
- `slug` (String)
- `status_page_url` (String)
- `terms_of_service_url` (String)
